rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0010
rows.name: I will relay the report from the analysis team exactly as it is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0020
rows.name: The first major fact that came to light by analyzing the Ares is[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0030
rows.name: Outside of the universe in which this planet Mira exists[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0040
rows.name: Or you could call it a dimension,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0050
rows.name: but it has been confirmed that countless other universes exist outside of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0060
rows.name: It's what you would call parallel universes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0070
rows.name: You might not be able to comprehend it right away,[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0080
rows.name: but after the battle before the White Whale crashed,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0090
rows.name: the Ares and I drifted through the rift between those universes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0100
rows.name: The navigational data from that time serves as evidence backing up the parallel universes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0110
rows.name: We had also grasped a certain degree of probability regarding their existence[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0120
rows.name: through our efforts to locate the Central Life,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0130
rows.name: and by observing the floating continent that appeared along with Void.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0140
rows.name: This time, those hypotheses were unified by the Ares's data,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0150
rows.name: leading us to this definitive answer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0160
rows.name:
So when Void said he would bring the world into concord,
he was referring to this fact[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0170
rows.name: Based on this, we understand that the universe where our original Earth existed[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0180
rows.name: and the current universe where planet Mira exists are entirely separate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0190
rows.name: And[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0200
rows.name: That the universe we originally came from was erased entirely,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0210
rows.name: universe and all, at the exact same time as Earth's destruction[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0220
rows.name: Universe and all... you say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0230
rows.name: When Void said "the defeated shall simply cease to be," that's what he meant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0240
rows.name: But what does this fact indicate?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_JNK0010
rows.name: Sleep

rows.label: xs31200100_SEL0010
rows.name: You can't stop your eyelids from drooping.

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0250
rows.name: Class has only just begun, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0260
rows.name: We have survived here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0270
rows.name: Impressive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0280
rows.name: Exactly. In other words...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0290
rows.name:
We escaped the erasure of the universe where Earth existed,
and arrived in this one[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0300
rows.name: Doesn't that prove we survived?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_JNK0020
rows.name: Serious

rows.label: xs31200100_SEL0020
rows.name: Answer that it means we survived.

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0310
rows.name: Full marks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0320
rows.name: Exactly. Earthlings have survived here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0330
rows.name: In other words...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0340
rows.name:
We escaped the erasure of the universe where Earth existed,
and arrived in this one[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0350
rows.name: Doesn't that prove we survived?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0360
rows.name: That means, at that time[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0370
rows.name: Thanks to the massive energy displacement caused by the universe's destruction,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0380
rows.name: we were able to escape to Mira by what you could call a miraculous coincidence...?[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0390
rows.name: It's purely a theoretical hypothesis derived from cross-referencing the remaining records, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0400
rows.name: In that case...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0410
rows.name: If we could secure an amount of energy equivalent to back then, could we...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0420
rows.name: escape from this disappearing universe as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0430
rows.name: But to cause something like that by human hands[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0440
rows.name: [ST:undisp ]Hah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0450
rows.name: That's right. That's exactly what the Ares is for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0460
rows.name: And...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0470
rows.name: The cores are the source of that power.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0480
rows.name: That's why Void targeted the Ares first and foremost.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0490
rows.name: The contest for survival has already begun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0500
rows.name: We[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0510
rows.name: We were thoroughly beaten to the punch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0520
rows.name: Nagi.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0530
rows.name: We urgently need to devise a new plan for survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0540
rows.name: Indeed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0550
rows.name: Let us call upon Maurice as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0560
rows.name: Yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0570
rows.name: The cooperation of other races will be absolutely essential.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0580
rows.name: Everyone, you heard what was said.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0590
rows.name: Until the plan can be formulated, continue with your regular duties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0600
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0610
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0620
rows.name: Al, you're free anyway, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0630
rows.name: Help out with the missions as a BLADE member.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0640
rows.name: Calling me "free" is quite the way to put it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0650
rows.name: Those who do not work, do not eat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs31200100_MSG0660
rows.name: Tch. Fine, I get it.[ST:wait ]
